title: alyssum hirsutum
intro: Alyssum hirsutum, also known as bearded alison or hairy alyssum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of alyssum hirsutum include its potential to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation, as well as its ability to support digestive health. Alyssum hirsutum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile ingredient in herbal remedies.
